Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}So this is Tartarus from the inside...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}This is only the second time anyone has come here without special equipment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Normal weaponry is useless against Shadows. Anything you brought provides little more than peace of mind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Everyone here has had their potential developed in our labs. That alone should suffice for protection.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Though should you get devoured, that would provide us with valuable data as well, heheheh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Ugh... Is there anyone left in the Ergo Division who isn't a psycho?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Are you all right with this? I mean... with bringing your daughter here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 254 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I don't mind at all. I myself requested to come along.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Eugh...! It appears we need to conduct further research in artificially developing the potential.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Did you see that!? Incredible, absolutely incredible! Such power![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}It's a Persona! I was right! People can use them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}That was wonderful, Miss Mitsuru! Of course you would be the first one to awaken your potential naturally![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}With this, the future truly does seem bright![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Now Mitsuru will be condemned to a life of atonement...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 224 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}She'll spend her prime years bound to our vile legacy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 254 10 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Don't worry, Father... This is what I wanted...[n]{f 1 1}
